description_long: A group of seven round donuts is arranged closely together, each with a thick layer of white powdered sugar dusted over the top. The donuts are golden-brown on the sides, indicating a classic fried dough texture. Three of the donuts have a glossy red jelly filling visible on top, two have a creamy white filling, and two have a chocolate-colored filling, each dollop slightly sunken into the powdered surface. The donuts are unwrapped and presented without any visible packaging or serving tray, suggesting a fresh, bakery-style presentation. The surface of the donuts appears soft and slightly matte, with the powdered sugar giving a delicate, powdery finish. No brand markings or logos are visible anywhere on the donuts.
description: Seven round, golden-brown donuts dusted with white powdered sugar, each topped with a dollop of red, white, or chocolate filling. The donuts are grouped together and unwrapped, with a soft, bakery-fresh appearance.
description_view_0: A close-packed group of seven donuts, with all three filling types (red, white, chocolate) visible on top of the powdered sugar.
description_view_1: The donuts are seen from a slight angle, highlighting the glossy fillings and the soft, powdery texture of the sugar; one donut is slightly separated from the group.
description_view_2: The arrangement shows the donuts from the opposite side, with the fillings more centrally visible and the golden-brown sides more prominent.
description_view_3: The donuts are viewed from the back, emphasizing the powdered tops and the distribution of the different fillings, with the group forming a loose arc.
attribute_icing_type: powdered sugar dusting with dollops of glossy fruit jelly, cream, and chocolate filling
attribute_placement_location: grouped together on an unadorned, flat surface
